text: *Abdur Rehman bin *Abdul Qari said, *I went out in the company of ‘Umar bin A-Khatiab one night in Ramadan to the mosque and found the people praying in different groups. A man praying alone o a man praying with a little group. behind him. So, *Umar said, ‘I my opinion | would better collect these (people) under the leadership of one Qari (Reciter) (ie. let them pray in congregation!). So, he made up his mind to ‘Gongregate them behind Ubai bin Ka'b. Then on another night | went again in his company and the people were praying behind their reciter. On that, "Umar remarked, 'What an excellent Bid'a (ie. innovation in religion) this is; but the prayer which they do not perform, but sleep at its time is better than the one they are offering." He meant the prayer in the last part of the night. (In those days) people used to pray in the early part of the night.* [ — : Sahih al-Bukhari 2010
